snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService delete Sample
snippets.description: Deletes the backup taken by a backup run.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService get Sample
snippets.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a backup run.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService insert Sample
snippets.description: Creates a new backup run on demand.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService list Sample
snippets.description: Lists all backup runs associated with the project or a given instance and configuration in the reverse chronological order of the backup initiation time.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService createBackup Sample
snippets.description: Creates a backup for a Cloud SQL instance. This API can be used only to create on-demand backups.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService getBackup Sample
snippets.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a backup.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService listBackups Sample
snippets.description: Lists all backups associated with the project.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService updateBackup Sample
snippets.description: Updates the retention period and the description of the backup. You can use this API to update final backups only.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService deleteBackup Sample
snippets.description: Deletes the backup.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService getConnectSettings Sample
snippets.description: Retrieves connect settings about a Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService generateEphemeralCert Sample
snippets.description: Generates a short-lived X509 certificate containing the provided public key and signed by a private key specific to the target instance. Users may use the certificate to authenticate as themselves when connecting to the database.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService delete Sample
snippets.description: Deletes a database from a Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService get Sample
snippets.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService insert Sample
snippets.description: Inserts a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance. **Note:** You can't modify the default character set and collation.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService list Sample
snippets.description: Lists databases in the specified Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService patch Sample
snippets.description: Partially updates a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance. This method supports patch semantics.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService update Sample
snippets.description: Updates a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService list Sample
snippets.description: Lists all available database flags for Cloud SQL instances.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService addServerCa Sample
snippets.description: Add a new trusted Certificate Authority (CA) version for the specified instance. Required to prepare for a certificate rotation. If a CA version was previously added but never used in a certificate rotation, this operation replaces that version. There cannot be more than one CA version waiting to be rotated in. For instances that have enabled Certificate Authority Service (CAS) based server CA, use AddServerCertificate to add a new server certificate.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService addServerCertificate Sample
snippets.description: Add a new trusted server certificate version for the specified instance using Certificate Authority Service (CAS) server CA. Required to prepare for a certificate rotation. If a server certificate version was previously added but never used in a certificate rotation, this operation replaces that version. There cannot be more than one certificate version waiting to be rotated in. For instances not using CAS server CA, use AddServerCa instead.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService addEntraIdCertificate Sample
snippets.description: Adds a new Entra ID certificate for the specified instance. If an Entra ID certificate was previously added but never used in a certificate rotation, this operation replaces that version.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService clone Sample
snippets.description: Creates a Cloud SQL instance as a clone of the source instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService delete Sample
snippets.description: Deletes a Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService demoteMaster Sample
snippets.description: Demotes the stand-alone instance to be a Cloud SQL read replica for an external database server.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService demote Sample
snippets.description: Demotes an existing standalone instance to be a Cloud SQL read replica for an external database server.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService export Sample
snippets.description: Exports data from a Cloud SQL instance to a Cloud Storage bucket as a SQL dump or CSV file.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService failover Sample
snippets.description: Initiates a manual failover of a high availability (HA) primary instance to a standby instance, which becomes the primary instance. Users are then rerouted to the new primary. For more information, see the [Overview of high availability](https://cloud.google.com/sql/docs/mysql/high-availability) page in the Cloud SQL documentation. If using Legacy HA (MySQL only), this causes the instance to failover to its failover replica instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService reencrypt Sample
snippets.description: Reencrypt CMEK instance with latest key version.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService get Sample
snippets.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService import Sample
snippets.description: Imports data into a Cloud SQL instance from a SQL dump  or CSV file in Cloud Storage.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService insert Sample
snippets.description: Creates a new Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService list Sample
snippets.description: Lists instances under a given project.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService listServerCas Sample
snippets.description: Lists all of the trusted Certificate Authorities (CAs) for the specified instance. There can be up to three CAs listed: the CA that was used to sign the certificate that is currently in use, a CA that has been added but not yet used to sign a certificate, and a CA used to sign a certificate that has previously rotated out.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService listServerCertificates Sample
snippets.description: Lists all versions of server certificates and certificate authorities (CAs) for the specified instance. There can be up to three sets of certs listed: the certificate that is currently in use, a future that has been added but not yet used to sign a certificate, and a certificate that has been rotated out. For instances not using Certificate Authority Service (CAS) server CA, use ListServerCas instead.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService listEntraIdCertificates Sample
snippets.description: Lists all versions of EntraID certificates for the specified instance. There can be up to three sets of certificates listed: the certificate that is currently in use, a future that has been added but not yet used to sign a certificate, and a certificate that has been rotated out.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService patch Sample
snippets.description: Partially updates settings of a Cloud SQL instance by merging the request with the current configuration. This method supports patch semantics.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService promoteReplica Sample
snippets.description: Promotes the read replica instance to be an independent Cloud SQL primary instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService switchover Sample
snippets.description: Switches over from the primary instance to the DR replica instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService resetSslConfig Sample
snippets.description: Deletes all client certificates and generates a new server SSL certificate for the instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService restart Sample
snippets.description: Restarts a Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService restoreBackup Sample
snippets.description: Restores a backup of a Cloud SQL instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService rotateServerCa Sample
snippets.description: Rotates the server certificate to one signed by the Certificate Authority (CA) version previously added with the addServerCA method. For instances that have enabled Certificate Authority Service (CAS) based server CA, use RotateServerCertificate to rotate the server certificate.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService rotateServerCertificate Sample
snippets.description: Rotates the server certificate version to one previously added with the addServerCertificate method. For instances not using Certificate Authority Service (CAS) server CA, use RotateServerCa instead.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService rotateEntraIdCertificate Sample
snippets.description: Rotates the Entra Id certificate version to one previously added with the addEntraIdCertificate method.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService startReplica Sample
snippets.description: Starts the replication in the read replica instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService stopReplica Sample
snippets.description: Stops the replication in the read replica instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService truncateLog Sample
snippets.description: Truncate MySQL general and slow query log tables MySQL only.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService update Sample
snippets.description: Updates settings of a Cloud SQL instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService createEphemeral Sample
snippets.description: Generates a short-lived X509 certificate containing the provided public key and signed by a private key specific to the target instance. Users may use the certificate to authenticate as themselves when connecting to the database.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService rescheduleMaintenance Sample
snippets.description: Reschedules the maintenance on the given instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService verifyExternalSyncSettings Sample
snippets.description: Verify External primary instance external sync settings.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService startExternalSync Sample
snippets.description: Start External primary instance migration.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService performDiskShrink Sample
snippets.description: Perform Disk Shrink on primary instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService getDiskShrinkConfig Sample
snippets.description: Get Disk Shrink Config for a given instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService resetReplicaSize Sample
snippets.description: Reset Replica Size to primary instance disk size.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService getLatestRecoveryTime Sample
snippets.description: Get Latest Recovery Time for a given instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService executeSql Sample
snippets.description: Execute SQL statements.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService acquireSsrsLease Sample
snippets.description: Acquire a lease for the setup of SQL Server Reporting Services (SSRS).

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService releaseSsrsLease Sample
snippets.description: Release a lease for the setup of SQL Server Reporting Services (SSRS).

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService preCheckMajorVersionUpgrade Sample
snippets.description: Execute MVU Pre-checks

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService pointInTimeRestore Sample
snippets.description: Point in time restore for an instance managed by Google Cloud Backup and Disaster Recovery.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService get Sample
snippets.description: Retrieves an instance operation that has been performed on an instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService list Sample
snippets.description: Lists all instance operations that have been performed on the given Cloud SQL instance in the reverse chronological order of the start time.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService cancel Sample
snippets.description: Cancels an instance operation that has been performed on an instance. Ordinarily, this method name should be `CancelSqlOperation`.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService delete Sample
snippets.description: Deletes the SSL certificate. For First Generation instances, the certificate remains valid until the instance is restarted.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService get Sample
snippets.description: Retrieves a particular SSL certificate.  Does not include the private key (required for usage).  The private key must be saved from the response to initial creation.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService insert Sample
snippets.description: Creates an SSL certificate and returns it along with the private key and server certificate authority.  The new certificate will not be usable until the instance is restarted.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService list Sample
snippets.description: Lists all of the current SSL certificates for the instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService list Sample
snippets.description: Lists all available machine types (tiers) for Cloud SQL, for example, `db-custom-1-3840`. For related information, see [Pricing](/sql/pricing).

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService delete Sample
snippets.description: Deletes a user from a Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService get Sample
snippets.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a user.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService insert Sample
snippets.description: Creates a new user in a Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService list Sample
snippets.description: Lists users in the specified Cloud SQL instance.

snippets.title: SqlBackupRunsService update Sample
snippets.description: Updates an existing user in a Cloud SQL instance.
